evidence: NascentRNA_Strand has bevel-depth keyframes for growth.
MatureMRNA_Cargo has location keyframes from processing region toward the selected pore.
PoreExport_CheckpointState has a keyed gate_open custom property for runtime mapping.
remaining_risks: Roblox runtime events must map to the Blender object names and may need Beam/Attachment replacements.
Phase 08G does not include final Roblox animation controller code.
